c1.criterion_text: Trigger conditions clearly define when to use and not use the skill, without obvious overlap that would cause misuse.

c2.criterion_text: Input normalization and criterion decomposition are operationally clear enough for an agent to produce 3-7 stable, checkable criteria before reviewer launch.

c3.criterion_text: Round-1 reviewer workflow is executable and preserves reviewer separation with structured evidence-bound JSON output.

c4.criterion_text: Aggregation and convergence semantics are internally coherent, criterion-level, and do not let mechanical aggregation alone overstate final audit status.

c5.criterion_text: Re-audit and stop conditions are consistent: later rounds focus only disputed blocking criteria and stop without forcing consensus.

c6.criterion_text: Output contract and final answer guidance give enough information for users to inspect the audit trail.
